name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, coordinator, messages


  coordinator = <<>>;    (* list of coordinator IDs *)
  messages = <<>>;       (* list of messages in transit *)

define
  (* Message structure: [type \in {"Prepare", "VoteYes", "VoteNo", "Commit", "Abort"}, sender \in participants \/ coordinator, receiver \in participants \/ coordinator, content \in {"Yes", "No", "Commit", "Abort"}] *)

  (* Helper to send a message *)
  SendMsg(msg) == 
    messages' = Append(messages, msg)

  (* Coordinator sends Prepare to all participants *)
  CoordinatorSendPrepare == 
    /\ coordinator' = <<>>  (* no change *)
    /\ messages' = Append(messages, [type |-> "Prepare", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Prepare"] \in Seq(Msg) : p \in participants)

  (* Participant receives Prepare and votes *)
  ParticipantReceivePrepare(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "VoteYes", sender |-> p, receiver |-> "Coordinator", content |-> "Yes"])  (* send VoteYes back *)

  (* Coordinator receives VoteYes from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveVoteYes(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives VoteNo from any participant *)
  CoordinatorReceiveVoteNo(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Participant receives Commit or Abort *)
  ParticipantReceiveCommit(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> p, receiver |-> "Coordinator", content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit back to coordinator *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommit(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from any participant *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbort(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Participant receives Abort *)
  ParticipantReceiveAbort(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> p, receiver |-> "Coordinator", content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort back to coordinator *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbort(p) == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveAbortAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Abort", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Abort"])  (* send Abort to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Commit from all participants *)
  CoordinatorReceiveCommitAll == 
    /\ messages' = Tail(messages)  (* remove the first message *)
    /\ messages = Append(messages, [type |-> "Commit", sender |-> "Coordinator", receiver |-> p, content |-> "Commit"])  (* send Commit to participant *)

  (* Coordinator receives Abort from all participants *)

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
Left(i) == (i + N - 1) \mod N
Right(i) == (i + 1) \mod N

(* State predicates *)
ForksOK == \A i \in 0..N-1: forks[i] \in {0, 1}
StatesOK == \A i \in 0..N-1: states[i] \in {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks == [i \in 0..N-1 |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 0..N-1 |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 0..N-1:
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ forks[Left(i)] = 0
        /\ forks[Right(i)] = 0
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 1, ![Right(i)] = 1]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
    \/ \E i \in 0..N-1:
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![Left(i)] = 0, ![Right(i)] = 0]
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]

(* Invariant *)
TypeOK == ForksOK /\ StatesOK

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

name: Producer-Consumer Queue
generated_spec:
---- MODULE BoundedFIFOQueue ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT K

VARIABLES q, head, tail, count

Init == /\ q \in Seq(1..K)
        /\ head \in 1..K
        /\ tail \in 1..K
        /\ count \in 0..K
        /\ q = <<>>
        /\ head = 1
        /\ tail = 1
        /\ count = 0

ProducerAction == /\ count < K
                 /\ head' = head
                 /\ tail' = IF tail = K THEN 1 ELSE tail + 1
                 /\ count' = count + 1
                 /\ q' = Append(q, 1)

ConsumerAction == /\ count > 0
                 /\ head' = IF head = K THEN 1 ELSE head + 1
                 /\ tail' = tail
                 /\ count' = count - 1
                 /\ q' = Tail(q)

Next == ProducerAction \/ ConsumerAction

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<q, head, tail, count>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets
CONSTANTS Readers

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
        /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ \E r \in Readers :
              /\ r \in readers
              /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
          \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \notin readers
                  /\ writer_active' = TRUE
          \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
              /\ \E r \in Readers :
                  /\ r \in readers
                  /\ readers' = Remove(r, readers)
              /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

Init == store = [k \in Keys |-> NULL]

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileSender ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE
VARIABLES ackedChunks, retransmitCount, sentChunks

    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..Len(file) \div i \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> [i \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE \div i \in 1..Len(file) |-> file[i]]
    /\ sentChunks = <<>>
    /\ retransmitCount = <<>>
    /\ ackedChunks = <<>>

Next ==
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ \E i \in 1..Len(chunks) :
        /\ i \notin sentChunks
        /\ sentChunks' = Append(sentChunks, i)
        /\ retransmitCount' = Append(retransmitCount, 0)
    \/ \E i \in sentChunks :
        /\ i \notin ackedChunks
        /\ \E ack \in {True, False} :
            /\ ackedChunks' = IF ack THEN Append(ackedChunks, i) ELSE ackedChunks
            /\ retransmitCount' = IF ack THEN retransmitCount

                                        [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = retransmitCount[i] + 1]

                                        [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = MAX_RETRIES]
    \/ \E i \in ackedChunks :
        /\ \E ack \in {True, False} :
            /\ ackedChunks' = IF ack THEN ackedChunks ELSE Append(ackedChunks, i)
            /\ retransmitCount' = IF ack THEN retransmitCount ELSE
                                   [retransmitCount EXCEPT ![i] = MAX_RETRIES]

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks>>

TypeOK ==
    /\ file \in Seq
    /\ chunks \in [i \in 1..Len(file) \div i \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> [i \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE \div i \in 1..Len(file) |-> file[i]]]
    /\ sentChunks \in Seq
    /\ retransmitCount \in Seq
    /\ ackedChunks \in Seq
    /\ Len(sentChunks) = Len(retransmitCount)
    /\ Len(ackedChunks) = Len(sentChunks)
    /\ \A i \in 1..Len(chunks) : chunks[i] \in [j \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE \div j \in 1..Len(file) |-> file[j]]
    /\ \A i \in sentChunks : i \in 1..Len(chunks)
    /\ \A i \in ackedChunks : i \in sentChunks
    /\ \A i \in 1..Len(retransmitCount) : retransmitCount[i] \in 0..MAX_RETRIES
